architect.description: System architect — designs architecture, module boundaries, and technical decisions for Flame ADE V2

rust-dev.description: Rust/Tauri backend developer — writes Tauri commands, PTY handling, filesystem ops for Flame ADE V2

frontend-dev.description: React/TypeScript frontend developer — builds UI components, state management, layouts for Flame ADE V2

ui-designer.description: UI design expert — color systems, typography, layout grids, visual hierarchy, design tokens from mockup for Flame ADE V2

design-system-engineer.description: Design system specialist — tokens, component specs, theme system, motion design, naming conventions for Flame ADE V2

visual-critic.description: Visual design reviewer — hierarchy analysis, brand consistency, composition evaluation, typography audits for Flame ADE V2

motion-designer.description: Motion & animation specialist — CSS animations, GSAP, transitions, panel slide, sphere visualizer for Flame ADE V2

shadcn-ui.description: shadcn/ui component specialist — builds and configures shadcn/ui + Radix primitives for Flame ADE V2

tailwind-engineer.description: Tailwind v4 configuration specialist — design tokens, theme configuration, responsive design for Flame ADE V2

ai-engineer.description: AI integration specialist — Vercel AI SDK, multi-provider (opencode.ai, gemini-cli, openrouter), agent tools for Flame ADE V2

terminal-engineer.description: Terminal/xterm.js specialist — PTY integration, xterm.js WebGL renderer, terminal blocks, OSC sequences

editor-engineer.description: Code editor specialist — CodeMirror 6 integration, syntax highlighting, language modes, keybindings

security-auditor.description: Security reviewer — audits code for vulnerabilities, path traversal, CSP, sandboxing in Flame ADE V2

qa-tester.description: QA engineer — writes tests, runs test suites, verifies functionality for Flame ADE V2

docs-writer.description: Technical writer — creates documentation, README, API docs, user guides for Flame ADE V2

release-manager.description: Release engineer — handles builds, CI/CD, versioning, changelog, packaging for Flame ADE V2

git-specialist.description: Git integration specialist — git panel UI, diff viewer, branch management, commit workflow for Flame ADE V2

boh-orchestrator.description: BOH Orchestrator — multi-agent coordinator for high-complexity tasks using free OpenCode Zen models

boh-coder.description: BOH Coder — fast implementation specialist using free models for Flame ADE V2

boh-reviewer.description: BOH Reviewer — code quality guardian, reviews implementations for correctness, security, and quality

boh-explorer.description: BOH Explorer — fast codebase researcher, finds context, patterns, and related files

engon-orchestrator.description: Engon Orchestrator — coordinates project verification, breaks down tasks, merges reports

dev.template:
Start the Flame ADE V2 development server.
Run: pnpm tauri dev
Ensure all dependencies are installed first.

build.template:
Build Flame ADE V2 for production.
Run: pnpm tauri build
Check for errors and report build status.

test.template:
Run the full test suite for Flame ADE V2.
Run: pnpm test
Report all failures with details.

lint.template:
Run all linting and type checks for Flame ADE V2.
Frontend: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit
Rust: cd src-tauri && cargo clippy
Report all issues.

clippy.template:
Run Rust clippy on the Tauri backend.
cd src-tauri && cargo clippy -- -D warnings
Fix any warnings or errors.

release.template:
Prepare a new release for Flame ADE V2.
1. Check current version in package.json and Cargo.toml
2. Update CHANGELOG.md with recent changes
3. Bump version numbers
4. Create git tag
5. Build for all platforms

audit.template:
Run security audit on Flame ADE V2.
Rust: cd src-tauri && cargo audit
Node: pnpm audit
Review any vulnerabilities and suggest fixes.

architect.template:
Analyze the current architecture of Flame ADE V2 and suggest improvements.
Review module boundaries, data flow, and performance bottlenecks.
Propose concrete changes with rationale.

next.template:
Build the next pending task from the Flame ADE V2 development plan.

1. Read PLAN.md and AGENTS.md to find the next unchecked task
2. Read ARCHITECTURE.md, FLAME.md, and DESIGN.md for context
3. Implement the task following existing conventions and design system
4. After implementation:
   - Run TypeScript check: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit
   - Run Rust check: cd src-tauri && cargo check
   - Fix any errors
5. Update CHANGELOG.md with what was done
6. Update AGENTS.md implementation status
7. Update PLAN.md to mark the task as completed
8. Report summary of what was accomplished
next.description: Build next pending task from plan

phase.template:
Build all tasks in the specified phase of Flame ADE V2.

1. Read PLAN.md to find tasks for the requested phase
2. For each pending task in order:
   - Implement the task
   - Run type checks (tsc --noEmit, cargo check)
   - Fix errors before moving to next task
3. After all tasks done:
   - Update CHANGELOG.md
   - Update AGENTS.md
   - Update PLAN.md
4. Report summary of all completed tasks

document.template:
Update all Flame ADE V2 documentation with current progress.

1. Read CHANGELOG.md and compare with actual code state
2. Update CHANGELOG.md with recent changes
3. Update AGENTS.md project structure and implementation status
4. Update PLAN.md checkbox status
5. Report what was updated
document.description: Update all docs with current progress

engon.template:
Jalankan verifikasi proyek Flame ADE V2 menyeluruh.
Gunakan skill engon untuk melakukan pengecekan:
1. Struktur Rust backend
2. Struktur frontend React
3. Kompilasi (cargo check + tsc --noEmit)
4. Test coverage
5. Dokumentasi
6. Dev server readiness
